creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
Created attachment 184375
postgresql95-pg_filedump.shar

pg_filedump is a utility to format PostgreSQL heap/index/control files
into a human-readable form.  You can format/dump the files several ways,
as listed in the Invocation section, as well as dumping straight binary.

WWW: https://wiki.postgresql.org/wiki/Pg_filedump

QA:
portlint -AC
looks fine.

poudriere testport passed on 11.0R-amd64

note:
This port can not use master/slave port because there are different dist files for each pgsql version. I will submit port for 9.2/9.3/9.4/9.6 after this port accepted.
